summary: Training Renewal Reminders feature fully tested. All backend APIs (11/11 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Quick Setup creates 3 schedules (60-day, 30-day, 7-day), idempotent behavior confirmed, toggle/run now/history all functional.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent components should have aria-describedby for accessibility compliance
seed_data_creation: Quick Setup created 3 training renewal schedules (60-day, 30-day, 7-day)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training Renewal Reminders feature fully tested. Scheduled Requests page at /portal/scheduled-requests shows: (1) Quick Setup Training Reminders button in header, (2) 3 training renewal schedules with Active badges and days before expiry, (3) Toggle switches for enable/disable, (4) Run Now buttons that execute schedules, (5) History buttons that open dialog with run details. Backend APIs: POST /api/bulk/schedules/quick-setup-training-reminders (idempotent), GET /api/training/expiring-summary, GET/POST /api/bulk/schedules endpoints all working.

quick_setup_button_visible.details: Quick Setup Training Reminders button visible in header with GraduationCap icon

quick_setup_creates_schedules.details: Creates 3 schedules: 60-day Early Warning, 30-day Reminder, 7-day Urgent Notice

quick_setup_idempotent.details: Second click shows 'Training renewal reminders are already configured' toast

schedules_display_correctly.details: Each schedule shows: name, Active badge, days before expiry, description, last run info

toggle_enable_disable.details: Toggle switches work to enable/disable schedules

run_now_button.details: Run Now executes schedule and shows results (0 sent, 2 not due)

history_button.details: Opens dialog showing run history with Employees, Sent, Duplicates, Not Due counts

api_verification.POST /api/bulk/schedules/quick-setup-tra: 200 OK - Creates 3 schedules or returns already_configured
api_verification.GET /api/training/expiring-summary: 200 OK - Returns expiring training summary with buckets
